mainspring master @ fa03ca7
Files: core/policy.py, core/signals.py, core/budget.py, core/pipeline.py
       (the ORM-free deterministic PolicyEngine + its pure deps — zero
       sqlalchemy/Session imports; verified ORM-free at vendor time).

The shadow comparator (ADR-0010 cut #2, decision-policy) only needs
PolicyEngine/Rule/Verdict from policy.py and SignalBundle/Signal from
signals.py. policy.py imports SignalBundle from signals.py, and signals.py
imports BudgetGovernor/Entity from budget.py/pipeline.py, so all four are
vendored verbatim to keep the relative imports intact (no hand edits).

Re-vendor: bash backend/scripts/vendor_mainspring_policy.sh
